title: Mydome Light Switch Timer – Police Approved Retro Fit Timer Switch - A No Wiring Home Security Lighting & Burglar Deterrent
features: A retro fit timer that installs in 1 minute and requires no wiring - Simply fits over your existing light switch
Can be used on single, double or triple gang light switches
A light timer that works with any type of light fitting or light bulb including energy saving bulbs, CFLS and LEDs
Home security 7 day digital timer, with up to 9 programs per day – featuring three modes - random, pre-programmed and manual
The Light Switch Timer is approved & recommended by The Police through their Secured by Design crime prevention initiative
description: Product Description mydome | Protect Your Home The Light Switch Timer by mydome The Timer Switch is an easy and reliable way to program your existing light switch into a programmable light switch using our patented design. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:00 Loaded : 0% Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:00   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected Audio Track Fullscreen This is a modal window. A Dark Home Looks Like an Empty Home Protect your home, when you’re out 4 out of 5 burglaries occur when there’s no-one at home. A dark home or dimly lit lamps are signs that a home is an easy house to target. The Light Switch Timer is Police Approved & Actively Recommended through their Secured by Design initiative The practical upgrade to the traditional timerplug Three modes Manual (Normal on/off operation of switch whilst your home) Pre-programmed (Build a personal timetable - Up to 9 programmes a day) Random (A programme that turns lights on/off once a night between the hours of 1 - 5am at random throughout the week) A Retro Fit Timer Designed For The Dark Winter Months A light welcoming you home in the dark winter months perfect when you're out late, away on holiday or don't want to come home to a dark house . Holiday Homes Battery operated security timer switch can make it appear like your home is occupied. (24/7 schedule function capabilities) Porch Security Eaasily schedule landscape lighting and external security lights Pets Do you leave a light on for your pet? Rather than keep lights on all day for our pets simply programme lights to turn on once its dark Previous page Loosen Screws Compatible With: 1 gang | 2 gang | 3 gang A Retro Fit Timer Once the cradle has been secured in place the light switch timer control unit will sit inside Programme your light Three modes: Manual | Pre-programmed | Random Upgraded Timer Plug A dark home or dimly lit lamps are signs that a home is an easy house to target. Next page Installation - 3 Easy Steps 1 Step 1 2 Step 2 3 Step 3 4 Upgraded Timer Plug Light Switch Timer Compatibility The home security lighting Light Switch Timer is compatible with all standard light switches On multiple gang switches you can choose which switches are activated / programmable. Ideal for switches that control: Landing | Hallway | Porch Previous page NHS National Home Security month Secured By Design Secured by Design (SBD): The official police security initiative Neighbourhood Watch Next page Police Approved 1 NHS 2 Police Initiative 3 Neighbourhood Watch Helping secure neighbourhoods since 2005 Police Approved & Actively Recommended mydome products can be found on the high street, in major retailers and DIY stores throughout the UK and more recently Europe. Our products have been recognised as being reliable and innovative, having won multiple awards. The light Switch Timer has been voted as home security product of the year
